description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark matte finish and a minimalist design. The device features a large, thin display with a narrow bezel and a distinctive notch at the top center, likely for a camera. The keyboard is backlit and features a standard QWERTY layout with a row of function keys, and the trackpad is generously sized, centered below the keyboard. The exterior lid displays a prominent, glossy black Apple logo in the center. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely aluminum, with some plastic and glass components. No ports or stickers are visible on the sides or palm rest, emphasizing its clean and streamlined appearance.
description: A modern, dark-finished laptop with a large screen, backlit keyboard, and a prominent Apple logo on the lid. The design is minimalist and sleek, with no visible ports or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a notch, full keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open screen; no ports are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid with a centered, glossy black Apple logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and open screen; no ports are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the exterior lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content or illumination.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; keys are backlit and there is a large trackpad below.
